source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. I am looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
Also, check out my podcast and AI summary recaps.
Gaming Tokens Are Disappearing From Crypto’s Top 100—What Happened?
Decrypt published an article about gaming tokens.
Crypto Game Crashouts: The Biggest Shutdowns So Far in 2025
Decrypt published an article about crypto game shutdowns.
STAR ATLAS #273 Upcoming Townhall with BIG NEWS!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas: Mining Tutorial In UE5 [4K]
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about mining in UE5.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #182
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Market Monday #125 w/ special guest Star Atlas
Neo Tokyo News posted a X Space with Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner.
Star Atlas Town Hall | June 2025
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Star Atlas Townhall.
Town Hall Report – June 4, 2025
Aephia published a Townhall report.
Star Atlas Town Hall Recap: The New Web3 Era Is Upon Us
Star Atlas published an article recapping the Townhall.
Star Atlas Economic Forum – June 2025 | Deep Dive into C4 with Chris
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Economic Forum.
I am looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
I am creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
